log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 29 damage. Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster HP: 38/67
→ Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 10 vs DC 14]
Frost Giant attacks Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster HP: 16/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 11 damage. Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster HP: 5/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 36 damage. Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
→ Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 8 vs DC 18]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
